title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #6, Kizaru, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Vegapunk as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, unc! Didn't I just tell you not to lay a hand on the weaponized sea beasts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They started it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This operation is being spear- headed...

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: ...by nine navy HQ Vice Admirals...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Admiral Kizaru!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You aren't making this easy for me, sentomarlu-kun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you just come on out and surrender?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fat chance! We'll be ready if you try some- thing like that again, unc....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oooh my... I'm absolutely terrified.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Grandpa punk based the Pacific's lasers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...off of the research he did on your powers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you're here to kill him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sentomaru-kun, no one can protect him from his own choice to research the void century.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am just a cog in the machine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, this fight isn't exactly in our best interest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything we break is a net loss for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, I think it's fair to assume that Rob Lucci and the others failed to complete their assassination mission?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thanks to the straw hats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Inside a certain warship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure no one knows I am here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what is the reality of the situation?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The straw hat pirates storm egghead to take vegapunk hostage..." This is a good article.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir! We have yet to receive any word from Cipher polo on whether their mission was a success...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's one of Morgans'.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, we can draw our own conclu- sions based on Sentoumaru's resistance...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
